
# Consciousness-First Theories

## Chapter Purpose

Examine panpsychism, cosmopsychism, idealism, analytic idealism, participatory universe models, and consciousness field theories.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
